title: Junior Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
